clusters.title: Eight children killed in shooting spree in Louisiana
clusters.neutral_headline: Eight children killed in shooting spree in Louisiana
bullet_summary: At a news conference outside a home, people audibly gasped and wailed as police revealed 10 people were shot in total, and that the eight dead were aged between 1 and 14
Reported by The Age, ABC News Australia

items.title: Eight children killed in shooting spree in Louisiana
items.standfirst: At a news conference outside a home, people audibly gasped and wailed as police revealed 10 people were shot in total, and that the eight dead were aged between 1 and 14.
items.content: At a news conference outside a home, people audibly gasped and wailed as police revealed 10 people were shot in total, and that the eight dead were aged between 1 and 14.

items.title: US domestic violence shooting leaves eight children dead
items.standfirst: The victims, who were shot at two homes in the US state of Louisiana, ranged in age from one to about 14 years old.
items.content: The victims, who were shot at two homes in the US state of Louisiana, ranged in age from one to about 14 years old.
